text: Healthy living means taking care of your body and mind. A balanced diet, with plenty of fruits and vegetables, gives you energy and helps prevent illness. Regular exercise, such as walking or swimming, keeps your heart strong and improves your mood. But sleep is just as important — adults need seven to nine hours each night to recover and stay focused. Mental health matters too. Managing stress through hobbies or talking to friends can make a big difference. Finally, a healthy work-life balance allows you to enjoy time with family and rest without feeling guilty. By combining these habits, you can build a happier, healthier life.
